rooms.name: Garage
rooms.description: Two-car garage at back of house. Concrete/rubber mat flooring with artificial turf sections. White drywall walls, exposed ceiling with garage door track hardware. Currently packed with moving boxes (temporary) and permanent gym equipment. Load-bearing pipe runs floor to ceiling near center.

estimated_dimensions.notes: You said '20 by 20 by 11 maybe 12'. Ceiling height varies slightly — standard area ~11ft, some sections up to 12ft near the peaked roof.

storage_areas.name: Upper wall shelves — back wall (left section)
storage_areas.position_description: Wall-mounted wire shelving running along the back wall, left of the load-bearing pipe. Starts from left corner.
storage_areas.notes: You said 'about 15 feet' for this section. Wire rack style, wall-mounted with brackets. Currently has storage bins, Igloo cooler, STOR-ALL boxes, lumber.

storage_areas.name: Upper wall shelves — back wall (right section)
storage_areas.position_description: Continues right of the load-bearing pipe along the back wall, past the staircase area, wrapping to the right wall.
storage_areas.notes: You said 'about 18, 16, 17 feet' and 'this one's a little bit taller maybe three and a half feet'. Has a black storage organizer, boxes. Loses about 8 inches of clearance in one area.

storage_areas.name: Upper wall shelves — right wall
storage_areas.position_description: Continues from the back-right section along the right wall toward the garage door.
storage_areas.notes: You said 'three feet again for another 10 feet that this spans maybe 11 feet'. Same wire rack style.

storage_areas.name: Upper wall shelves — garage door wall
storage_areas.position_description: Wire shelving above the garage door wall area, visible in frames looking toward the door side. Has pegboard section below it with tools.
storage_areas.notes: Visible in frames 3 and 18. Has pegboard tool organizer mounted below shelves on this wall.

storage_areas.name: Pegboard tool wall
storage_areas.position_description: Pegboard mounted on the wall near the door to the house/staircase side. Various tools, clamps, and small items hanging from it.
storage_areas.notes: Visible in frames 3, 18. Has scissors, clamps, various hand tools organized on hooks.

storage_areas.name: Wall-mounted hook rack
storage_areas.position_description: Rubbermaid-style wall hook system with folding chairs, bags hanging from it. On the wall opposite the garage door.
storage_areas.notes: Visible in frame 13. Has folding chairs and bags hanging from heavy-duty hooks.

permanent_fixtures.name: Load-bearing pipe
permanent_fixtures.description: Metal pipe running floor to ceiling, roughly center of the garage. You explicitly called this out as permanent and load-bearing.

permanent_fixtures.name: Cable machine / weightlifting tower
permanent_fixtures.description: Large white/black cable tower with pulleys, pull-up bar, and various cable attachments. Positioned near the garage door opening.

permanent_fixtures.name: Dumbbell rack
permanent_fixtures.description: Multi-tier dumbbell rack on wheels with a full set of adjustable/fixed dumbbells.

permanent_fixtures.name: Weight bench
permanent_fixtures.description: Adjustable weight bench, black. Visible in frame 13 near the back wall.

permanent_fixtures.name: Weight plate holder with bars
permanent_fixtures.description: Weight plate tree/holder with Olympic bars stored on it.

permanent_fixtures.name: Joiner/Planar
permanent_fixtures.description: Woodworking jointer/planer pushed against the wall. You said this stays permanently.

permanent_fixtures.name: Electrical panel
permanent_fixtures.description: Gray electrical breaker panel mounted on the right wall near the garage door track.

rooms.temporary_items_note: All boxes, storage totes, moving supplies, furniture (couch, stroller, etc.) on the garage floor are TEMPORARY and will be moved. Ignore for permanent layout.
features: Two-car garage door (open in video, faces driveway/street)
Artificial turf covering portions of the floor
Rubber gym mats on left side floor
Overhead garage door track and opener hardware
Red emergency pull cord for garage door
Window on right wall near staircase

connections.description: Wooden staircase with 4-5 steps going UP from garage level into the house. Wooden railing/banister on left side. Door at top leads into the living room / main open-plan area. The garage is below the main floor level.

rooms.name: Living Room
rooms.description: Open-plan living area on the main floor, above the garage. You said 'one open area for the entire downstairs' (relative to upstairs). Stone fireplace with shelving visible on the left when entering. Warm-toned walls (burgundy/mauve accent wall). Large sectional sofa. Hardwood floors. Flows openly into kitchen area with pendant lights and island.

estimated_dimensions.notes: Dimensions not narrated for this room. Height estimated from standard construction. This is part of a larger open-plan area that includes the kitchen — full dimensions will come from a dedicated living room video.

storage_areas.name: Hall/utility closet
storage_areas.position_description: Closet with white door visible on the right when entering from the garage. Currently has shelving with paper towels, cleaning supplies, Amazon boxes.
storage_areas.notes: Visible in frame 34. Has at least 2 shelves.

storage_areas.name: Fireplace built-in shelving
storage_areas.position_description: Stone fireplace with built-in shelving/display area on the left when entering from garage stairs.
storage_areas.notes: River rock stone surround with wood mantel and shelving. Visible in frame 33.

features: Pendant lighting over kitchen island area
Fiddle leaf fig plant near fireplace

connections.description: Stairs going DOWN to the garage
Open-plan flow directly into kitchen area with island and pendant lights. No wall or door separating them.
